code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
    if is_ws
      if in_token
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let key = "\n#{tok}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{tok}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_token
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let key = "\n#{tok}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
